response.overview: Set in Tokyo in the 2010s, Sailor Moon Crystal follows Usagi Tsukino, a clumsy 14-year-old who, with the assistance of her pet cat Luna, discovers she is the magical Sailor Moon. Tasked with finding the Moon Princess and the Legendary Silver Crystal, she unites the Sailor Guardians to fight cosmic evils.
response.tagline: "I am the Pretty Guardian who fights for love and for justice!"
response.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
